name: Pita of Greens, Herbs & Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the fresh greens (spinach, dandelions, chicory, endive, or other fresh greens). Drain and chop.
2. Sprinkle chopped greens with salt and squeeze to remove excess liquid.
3. In a large bowl, combine the chopped greens with parsley, dill, and chervil. Mix thoroughly.
4. In a large frying pan, melt 1/4 cup butter over medium heat. Add scallions and sauté until white parts are translucent.
5. Continue cooking over medium heat. Add the mixed greens, spices (allspice, cinnamon, nutmeg), sugar, salt, and pepper to taste. Season with additional salt in the feta cheese later.
6. Simmer for 20 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed. Remove from heat and let cool in a large bowl.
7. Combine cooled mixture with eggs, crumbled feta, and enough milk to moisten the greens. Mix well.
8. Butter a 15 x 11 x 2-inch baking pan. Arrange 6 sheets of filo, brushing each with melted butter.
9. Pour filling evenly over the filo layers. Cover with remaining filo, brushing each sheet with butter.
10. Flute the edges and brush top with butter. Score the top 3 filo sheets into squares or diamonds.
11. Bake for 45 minutes in a moderate oven (350°F). Allow to cool slightly before slicing and serving warm.
Note: To eliminate salting the spinach, cook it over very low heat until wilted, then drain thoroughly.
